attributes.action: Make electric vehicles (e.g. e-scooters) legal under certain conditions
attributes.additional_details:
Safety issues can be a big problem so why not add some restrictions like 10+ allowed with parental consent and some more - that dont take the fun 
away.
attributes.background: Children are always looking for fun, so why not grant that by making the e-scooters legal without things like insurance.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign these petitions which call for similar actions:

https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/747006 
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/765825
